sources.name: Singapore PairSearch (Hansard & Supreme Court)
sources.notes: Open Government Products tool enabling search of Hansard (parliamentary debates) and Supreme Court judgments. Free access. Complements SG/JudiciaryCaseLaw.

sources.name: Singapore Statutes Online (SSO)
sources.notes: All current/historical Singapore legislation and subsidiary legislation. Full text HTML. Well-structured URLs. No documented API.

sources.name: Singapore eLitigation Court Judgments
sources.notes: Official Singapore court portal. Supreme Court, District Courts, Family Courts. Full text published judgments.

sources.name: Slovenian National Assembly (Državni zbor)
sources.notes: Plenary session transcripts from 1990-present. HTML scraping, no official API. The academic siParl corpus (built from this data) contains 1M+ speeches and 210M words (1990-2022). Slovenian language. F

sources.name: Sierra Leone Legal Information Institute
sources.notes: AKN platform. Supreme Court, Appeal Court, High Court decisions + ~80 Acts. Full text HTML.

sources.name: San Marino Official Gazette
sources.notes: Official gazette of San Marino. 2,000+ acts. HTML search with full text. Constitutional Laws, Qualified Laws, Ordinary Laws, Decrees.

sources.name: Senegal Legal Information Institute
sources.notes: Senegalese laws + Journal Officiel + case law. French language. Full text.

sources.name: Suriname Wetten.sr Legislation
sources.notes: New legislation portal. Dutch. Possible REST API.

sources.name: El Salvador Supreme Court Jurisprudence
sources.notes: Supreme Court case law database. Full text decisions.

sources.name: Togo Journal Officiel
sources.notes: 12,000+ texts from 1920-present. Laws, decrees, decisions. Full text PDF. French.

sources.name: Thailand Royal Gazette OCR Dataset (HuggingFace)
sources.notes: 200,000+ Royal Gazette pages from 1884-present. OCR text + PDF. Public domain. HuggingFace dataset.

sources.name: Office of the Council of State (Krisdika) Thai Laws
sources.notes: 1500+ Acts of Parliament + subordinate legislation. PDF/TIF. PyThaiNLP dataset on HuggingFace (pythainlp/thailaw) also available.

sources.name: Thailand Office of Council of State Laws (Krisdika)
sources.notes: All Thai Acts of Parliament. Public domain (per Krisdika). Source for PyThaiNLP dataset.

sources.name: Thailand Laws Dataset (PyThaiNLP)
sources.notes: Thai law dataset from PyThaiNLP project. Data sourced from Office of the Council of State (Krisdika). Public domain. Available as GitHub releases. Complements TH/Krisdika.

sources.name: Royal Thai Government Gazette Online
sources.notes: Official Royal Gazette of Thailand. All Thai legislation published here. Thai language only. Free access online since 2023 (digital-first publication). PDF format likely.

sources.name: Tunisia Official Printing and Publishing Office (IORT)
sources.notes: Official gazette (JORT). Full text of Tunisian laws, decrees, orders in Arabic and French.

sources.name: Tunisia Legislation Portal
sources.notes: All Tunisian laws/decrees since 1956, Constitution, Official Gazette. Full text. Arabic/French/English.

sources.name: Turkish Parliament (TBMM)

sources.name: Trinidad & Tobago Digital Legislative Library
sources.notes: Acts 1838-2025 + subsidiary legislation. Point-in-time versions. Full text PDF. Law Revision Commission.

sources.name: Constitutional Court of Taiwan (R.O.C.)
sources.notes: Constitutional interpretations 1949-present + constitutional judgments 2022+. English translations available. Scraping required.

sources.name: Taiwan Judicial Yuan Open Data
sources.notes: Judicial Yuan open data on GitHub. Machine-readable court decision format. Bulk download.

sources.name: Tanzania Legal Information Institute
sources.notes: TanzLII: Court of Appeal, High Court, tribunals decisions + legislation. AfricanLII member. Full text.

sources.name: Constitutional Court of Ukraine (Конституційний Суд)
sources.notes: Constitutional Court decisions by year. HTML scraping from /docs/183 section. Decisions since 1996. Ukrainian language. Free access.

sources.name: Uganda Legal Information Institute
sources.notes: ULII: Operated by Uganda Judiciary Law Reporting Unit. Supreme Court, Appeal Court, High Court decisions + Acts. Free Access to Law member. Full text HTML.

sources.name: UN Digital Library
sources.notes: Successor to UNBISnet. Resolutions, meeting records, reports, speeches, voting data. MARC search + PDF. Metadata from 1979+, full-text digital from 1993+. 6 UN languages.

sources.name: OHCHR Treaty Body Jurisprudence Database
sources.notes: Decisions of 8 UN treaty bodies on individual human rights complaints. Full text HTML. Searchable by treaty body, country, article. Based on Utrecht University SIM database.

sources.name: Cornell Legal Information Institute
sources.notes: All 54 USC titles + 50 state statutes + CFR. Well-structured HTML. No API but scrapeable. Quarterly updates.

sources.name: OpenLaws US (Statutes & Regulations)
sources.notes: Free simplified access to current and historical US statutes and regulations. API available for LegalTech and LLMs. Transcribed from scans. Complements US/USCode and US/eCFR.

sources.name: US Supreme Court Database (Washington University)
sources.notes: Coded metadata for every Supreme Court decision since 1791. Variables include case outcomes, issue areas, voting patterns. Bulk CSV download. Academic dataset. Check if full text included or just meta

sources.name: IMPO - Centro de Información Oficial
sources.notes: Complete Uruguayan legislation from Law No. 1 to present: Constitution, codes, laws (1905+), decrees (1964+), resolutions (1975+). Free access. Cross-referenced and consolidated.

sources.name: Uruguay Parliamentary Legislation Database
sources.notes: Full text of all Uruguayan laws from Parliament website. Searchable by number, year, keyword.

sources.name: Uruguay Judicial Branch Case Law Database
sources.notes: Base de Jurisprudencia Nacional. Full-text Supreme Court and appellate decisions. Free public access.

sources.name: Uzbekistan National Legislation Database Case Law

sources.name: Venezuela Supreme Court Decisions (TSJ)

sources.name: LuatVietnam English Translations

sources.name: Vietnam National Legal Portal

sources.name: VBPL Vietnamese Legal Normative Documents

sources.name: Burkina Faso Legislation Database

sources.name: Bahrain Legislation & Legal Opinion Commission
